metadata.description: Fabric sheen shader - complex BSDF model with limited Unity support

summary: Sheen effect for fabrics and cloth. Uses complex BSDF model. Limited direct support in Unity.
unity_approximation: Use Fresnel + custom function to approximate edge sheen
limitations: No native sheen BSDF in Unity
workaround: Use Velvet BSDF approximation (Fresnel edge glow) instead
compatibility_loss_70_percent: Fundamentally different rendering model - approximation only
